---
title: "Offense vs Defense Explorer"
description: "Compare how teams defend different scoring types."
format:
  html:
    resources:
      - https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/shinylive@0.2.2/dist/
---

```{r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 900

library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(teamcolors)

# Load your data processing function
# (assumes your NBA_synergy_copy.R is available)
# For now, we'll use placeholder data structure

ui <- fluidPage(
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML("
      body {
        font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
        background-color: #f9fafb;
      }
      .shiny-input-container {
        margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
      }
      .shiny-input-container label {
        font-weight: 600;
        color: #1f2937;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
      }
      select, input {
        border-radius: 6px;
        border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
        padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
      }
      select:focus, input:focus {
        outline: none;
        border-color: #0ea5e9;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.1);
      }
      .well {
        background-color: #fff;
        border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        border-radius: 8px;
      }
      h1 {
        color: #000;
        font-weight: 800;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
      }
      .section-desc {
        color: #666;
        margin-bottom: 2rem;
        font-size: 1rem;
      }
    "))
  ),

  div(
    style = "padding: 2rem;",

    h1("Offense vs Defense Explorer"),
    p("Select a stat, offensive team, and defensive team to compare scoring patterns.",
      class = "section-desc"),

    fluidRow(
      column(3,
        selectInput(
          "stat",
          "Scoring Type",
          choices = c(
            "Points" = "POINTS",
            "Drives" = "DRIVE",
            "Catch & Shoot" = "CATCH_SHOOT",
            "Pull Ups" = "PULL_UP",
            "Paint" = "PAINT",
            "Post" = "POST",
            "Elbow" = "ELBOW"
          ),
          selected = "POINTS"
        )
      ),
      column(3,
        selectInput(
          "offense",
          "Offensive Team",
          choices = c("SAS", "NYK", "LAL", "GSW", "BOS", "MIA"),
          selected = "SAS"
        )
      ),
      column(3,
        selectInput(
          "defense",
          "Defensive Team",
          choices = c("NYK", "SAS", "LAL", "GSW", "BOS", "MIA"),
          selected = "NYK"
        )
      )
    ),

    plotOutput("ovd_plot", height = "600px", width = "100%")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {

  output$ovd_plot <- renderPlot({
    # Placeholder plot - replace with your actual chart_ovd function
    # when Shinylive has access to your NBA_synergy_copy.R

    p <- ggplot(data.frame(x = 1, y = 1), aes(x, y)) +
      geom_point(size = 10, color = "#0ea5e9") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(
        title = paste(input$stat, "by Team"),
        subtitle = paste(input$offense, "offense vs", input$defense, "defense")
      ) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", color = "#000"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, color = "#666"),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_blank()
      )

    p
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
